topic.title: Guest Speaker Feedback – Enrique Sallent Session
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Enrique Sallent has asked for your feedback on his guest speaker session. Your input helps him refine his presentation and helps us continue to book great speakers like him for future classes.

Please take 2-3 minutes to complete this survey: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/DKSZXL2

Your honest feedback is valuable—what worked, what didn't, what you'd like to see more of in future sessions.

Thanks, Nina & Nik
